_comment: GravitLauncher egg (Java 25) — fork of VIZZI-DK/gravit-eggs. Image built & published by GitHub Actions in StepanchukYI/pelican-eggs.
name: GravitLauncher (Java 25)
author: bodunjo855@gmail.com
description: GravitLauncher LaunchServer on Java 25. Built from StepanchukYI/pelican-eggs.

installation.script:
#!/bin/ash
# Gravit LaunchServer installation script (v5.7.x, Java 25)
# Server files: /mnt/server

apk add --no-cache curl unzip

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

echo "Resolving LaunchServer version"
s_version=${SERVER_VERSION}
if [ "$s_version" = "latest" ]; then
  s_version=$(curl --silent "https://api.github.com/repos/GravitLauncher/Launcher/releases/latest" | grep '"tag_name":' | sed -E 's/.*"([^"]+)".*/\1/' | cut -c2-)
fi
echo "Installing GravitLauncher v${s_version}"

echo "Downloading LaunchServerBuild.zip"
curl -fL "https://github.com/GravitLauncher/Launcher/releases/download/v${s_version}/LaunchServerBuild.zip" --output LaunchServerBuild.zip
unzip -o LaunchServerBuild.zip
rm LaunchServerBuild.zip
chmod +x bin/launchserver

echo "Downloading ServerWrapper.jar"
curl -fL "https://github.com/GravitLauncher/Launcher/releases/download/v${s_version}/ServerWrapper.jar" --output ServerWrapper.jar

downloading_r=${SHOULD_DOWNLOAD_RUNTIME}
if [ "$downloading_r" = "1" ] || [ "$downloading_r" = "true" ]; then
  echo "Resolving LauncherRuntime version"
  r_version=${RUNTIME_VERSION}
  if [ "$r_version" = "latest" ]; then
    r_version=$(curl --silent "https://api.github.com/repos/GravitLauncher/LauncherRuntime/releases/latest" | grep '"tag_name":' | sed -E 's/.*"([^"]+)".*/\1/' | cut -c2-)
  fi
  echo "Downloading LauncherRuntime v${r_version}"
  curl -fL "https://github.com/GravitLauncher/LauncherRuntime/releases/download/v${r_version}/JavaRuntime_lmodule.jar" --output "JavaRuntime-${r_version}.jar" || echo "JavaRuntime_lmodule.jar not available, skipping"
  curl -fL "https://github.com/GravitLauncher/LauncherRuntime/releases/download/v${r_version}/runtime.zip" --output runtime.zip
  mkdir -p runtime/
  unzip -o runtime.zip -d runtime/
  rm runtime.zip
fi

echo "Done!"

variables.name: Runtime Version
variables.description: Version of Gravit Runtime to install (or 'latest')

variables.name: Download Runtime
variables.description: Should we download Runtime when installing LaunchServer. Set to 1 to download.
